Height.description:
Height of the hexagonal opening, equal to the height of the cut being made in the section being castellated.
For case of non-zero SpacerHeight, the total height of the opening will be Height+SpacerHeight. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Width.description: Total width of the opening. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

WidthWebPost.description: Clear distance between openings. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

SpacerHeight.description: Height of any spacer plate between the two profile sides. Results in an octagonal opening for a non-zero value. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Spacing.description: Centre to centre distance between openings. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
